old_value: {"id":"broadside-f47y","title":"DID support (did:web + did:key) for persona identity","description":"Add decentralized identifier support to broadside personas, compatible with gaja and smallhold implementations. Each persona gets an Ed25519 recovery keypair encoded as did:key (multicodec 0xed01 + base58btc, z6Mk... prefix) and a did:web derived from domain. DID documents served at /users/{username}/did.json per W3C DID v1. Actor documents include alsoKnownAs with both DIDs. BIP-39 24-word mnemonic for recovery phrase.","design":"Compatible with gaja did.rs and smallhold did.rs: same did:key encoding (ed25519 multicodec + base58btc), same did:web format (did:web:{domain}:users:{username}), same DID document structure (W3C DID v1 context, RsaVerificationKey2018 + Ed25519VerificationKey2020 verification methods), same BIP-39 mnemonic format. No did:plc (AT Protocol specific to gaja). Recovery is per-persona since broadside has no user accounts.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"mark@reviewcommit.com","created_at":"2026-07-20T01:32:57.367156863Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-20T01:32:57.367156863Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"broadside-f47y","depends_on_id":"broadside-205m","type":"supersedes","created_at":"2026-07-20T01:34:10.224071295Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
